text.message: Will trade you a wheat to leave my 3:1 alone, red
Okay, so should be a nice deal then lol
Would be fun if it made the entire round
Also, it makes a lot of sense
It was bot pick tho (which I always find kinda weak tbh)
Gonna give you a good deal here
Yeah, but I am knighting anyways
So either I block you or black
This is such a good deal for you
that is not a good trade
Giving you two of your rarest resource for a resource you have two of in hand?
no we are both further back
the 2 wheat does nothing to me
And the deal I tried to make earlier, it's more or less me just giving you a free rare card lol
if you saw my hand you would disagree
Which is exactly why I'm trying to do actually good deals with you that benefit us both
This type of non cooperation is always losing lol
Bro, what are you talking about lol
I started off the game by making a friendly offer of peace to avoid us racing lol
youre trying to extort on someone who is last
I'm trying to make mutually beneficial deals*
And you're doing just fine lol
you really gotta stop thinking that we were ever racing to that 3:1
I didn't think we were racing
It didn't make sense for you to go for it
I just wanted to make sure
Hence: you just gave up on a free rare resource and made it ambiguous you were going for my spot for no reason
Many people on here plow just for the sake of it
Your answer makes me think you're thinking of it lol
i didnt want to get rid of my wood
Guys stop fighting each other and start thinking about a way of stopping blue
I offered you a free wheat
See? We're both lagging behind. Wonder why
the nbs coincided with the wood trade
and like i said and like black said
You've clearly not read anything I've said lol
you clearly made a wrong play
I'm more worried about red than blue here. Think you're over reacting to blue tbh
3 nonknights can change game any time
One of them is mono for sure
But sure, if he cities he is doing very well
Red gets road here most likely tho
And has super strong production and flexibility
Non knight for red as well
even if they dont get army now
Lots of knight already out and both me and black have better prod
I'm saying both me and black are more likely to have army than him
you really have to stop robbing me
But yeah, I aggree. Was prob black there
Not really scared of black with road lol
But him overtaking army is ofc not good
Red, you never said you thought black was in the lead before now lol. It was blue in your mind
Since you will continue making roads
that was before they pulled two more devs
We really needed me to pop there
Would use mono if had last thrn
It's still black in that case
Any willingness to give me a pop here?
idk why you even try to keep army
one of them are keeping it
It's red from your pov, black
How do you not play knight???
I already said i didnt have it
You needed to help me pop then
So both you and blue have 5 vps each?
bro youre making the wrong plays and then say "this table"
Best case scenario for the table is I get a knight
Red, you're on 8 with open settle
Blue is easily controlled if I take army from him, which was a slim task to do for the table a couple of turns ago
i dont think you ever stole from blue
Think I did once, but no, I haven't
See above messages for the reasoning
I have been the only one without a game to lose here
And the one you guys should have wanted with army
Hmm and why does he have army locked?
Because you didnt make easy trades to give me 1 dev at a critical juncture
that is not an easy trade
you threw the whole game and blame us
Bro, I'm telling you, I've been the one player here without a game to throw
Red goes to 9 while whining lol
at least they understand whats going on
Really don't understand the reasoning that it's blue. They both need to build a last point. Red needs a road settle, blue needs a city
Oh, blue needs two cities lol
and will easily get the other
